creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

These days there have been so many other changes to arla 
that it won't even compile at all, so it's probable that 
this patch won't help much.  See PR ports/43484 for a more 
recent attempt to get it to compile.  But, at this point, 
unless someone steps forward to adopt it, this port is 
probably in danger of being deleted.
